methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series D → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.5x) to $200M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 6 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in Biotech & Health. Range: $1.5B - $5.3B.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Biotech & Health P/S median is 6.6x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Biotech & Health
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Biotech & Health
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Biotech & Health

private.name: HistoSonics
private.rationale: Same sector (Biotech & Health), same stage (Series D), post-money $2.25B

private.name: Formation Bio
private.rationale: Same sector (Biotech & Health), same stage (Series D), post-money $1.7B+

data.narrative:
Synchron is a Series D-stage biotech company that has raised $200M+ to date. The valuation analysis draws on a peer universe of 8 private and 3 public companies operating in the Biotech & Health sector at the same or adjacent stages.

Two methods were applied to triangulate value. Stage-progression analysis, which applies a 1.5x multiplier to the $200M total raised as a proxy for current base value, implies a valuation of $300M. Peer-median analysis across six same-sector, same/adjacent-stage comparables—including HistoSonics, Formation Bio, Abridge, Ultima Genomics, and Insitro—yields a median valuation of $2.3B, with a range spanning $1.5B to $5.3B. Public-comp anchoring using a 6.6x price-to-sales median across three public Biotech & Health tickers (RXRX, TEM, ONT.L) could not be applied due to the absence of Synchron's revenue disclosure. The triangulated analysis produces a valuation range of $255M (low) to $2.7B (high), with a median of $1.3B. This wide range reflects material uncertainty between the stage-progression method and the peer-median method. The key dependency is understanding how Synchron's clinical stage, technology maturity, and capital efficiency compare to the peer set, particularly to HistoSonics and Formation Bio at the same stage.
